title:
Coach Her Game™️ | The New Coaching Playbook on Instagram: "Unfortunately telling isn’t teaching. (It’d make things a lot easier if it was!!)

And “shake it off” doesn’t give athletes real tools.

So I started teaching them HOW to reset.

👇 Comment MENTAL GAME and I’ll send you my free training where I show you exactly how to teach the Snapback Routine to your team too.

#headcoach #highschoolcoach #mentaltraining #sportspsychology"
description:
